1.description: retrieve Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1 km grid cells that intersect Kristiansand extent (prefilter by bbox from step 1)

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons filtered by Kristiansand extent (prefilter by bbox from step 1)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect storm-surge polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids that intersect storm-surge areas

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) LIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, ssbid1000m, geom FROM statistiskrutenett1km.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'))

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) LIKE '%kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT id, objid, lokalid, shape_area, geom FROM statistiskrutenett1km.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom && (SELECT ST_Extent(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) LIKE '%kristiansand%');

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 1km grid cells within Kristiansand bbox

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons within Kristiansand bbox (stormflo200ar_klimaarna)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids intersecting storm-flood areas

7.description: limit final result to one row with the count
